name: Marble Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform cake pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla. Beat until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time to the cream cheese mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in the melted chocolate into 1 cup of the batter.
6. Spoon alternating layers of plain and chocolate batter over the crust, cutting through the batters several times with a knife for the marble effect.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce the oven temperature to 250 degrees F. and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Remove from the springform pan and allow to cool before refrigerating.
